description: The Lo Giudice 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a Mafia-type criminal organization based in Calabria, Italy. It operates in the Santa Caterina district of Reggio Calabria. During the second 'Ndrangheta war, the clan sided with the Imerti-Condello-Serraino-Rosmini alliance. Key members include Giuseppe Lo Giudice, killed in 1990, and Antonino Lo Giudice, a former pentito who later recanted.
